title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
